query: 이력서 리뷰해줘. _config.yml에 있어. 전체적인 피드백 부탁해.
이력서 검토 부탁해. 자기소개 부분이 좀 약한 것 같은데 어떻게 개선하면 좋을지 알려줘.
이력서 좀 봐줘. 경력 섹션 bullet들이 임팩트가 있는지, 문제해결 섹션이 면접에서 버틸 수 있는 수준인지 확인해줘.
토스증권 서버 개발자 JD 기반으로 이력서 리뷰해줘. JD는 Java/Kotlin, Spring, Redis, Kafka 위주야.
네이버 검색 백엔드 JD 기반으로 이력서 리뷰해줘. 경력이랑 문제해결 섹션이 이 JD에 맞는지 봐줘. _config.yml에 있어.
Can you review my resume? It's in _config.yml. Please give me overall feedback.
Review my resume. The self-introduction section feels a bit weak — please tell me how to improve it.
resume review please. I want to know if my self-introduction and problem-solving sections are interview-ready
Please review my resume. Specifically, check if the trade-off analysis in the problem-solving section is sufficient — the cache implementation and POS integration parts.
Give me feedback on my resume. Check overall whether the career section bullets have impact, and whether the problem-solving section is strong enough to hold up in an interview.
Can you take a look at my resume? The self-introduction might be too long, and I'm not sure the problem-solving project order is right either.
Evaluate the entire resume in _config.yml using S1-S5 and D1-D6 criteria. Also apply P.A.R.R. to the signature project.
Find the items in my resume that might look like industry standard. Check if things like Redis cache implementation or introducing unit tests come across as actual achievements.
my resume is at _config.yml can you check if the achievement lines have proper causation and specificity
The self-introduction tone in my resume feels too AI-generated. Can you run the humanizer and check?

I want to apply to Toss Securities as a server developer. I'll send you the JD.

[Job Posting]
Server Engineer
- Server development experience with Kotlin/Java
- Experience handling large-scale traffic
I need to prepare my application for Line Manga. The JD is in cover-letters/linemanga-jd.yaml.
There's a typo in the Mines career description in _config.yml. Fix 'schedular' to 'scheduler'.
The problem-solving section has a weird page break in the resume layout. Please update the page-break related styles in _sass/modern-resume-theme.scss.
When I run bun run pdf, I get a Docker connection error. Can you check why? It shows Error: connect ECONNREFUSED.
Show me the resume diff between the bemyfriends/260317 branch and the main branch. I want to see what changed.
Help me prepare for interviews. Generate expected questions based on my resume — especially around the cache implementation project and LLM metadata inference.
I want to add Docker and Kubernetes to the tech stack section. Please update _config.yml.
I want to reduce the margin in the generate-resume-pdf.ts script. Change top from 11mm to 8mm.
I want to apply for a backend engineer role at Coupang. Customize my resume based on the JD and generate the PDF as well.
Review my resume based on the Naver Search backend JD. Check if the career and problem-solving sections fit this JD. It's in _config.yml.
Based on this JD, recommend which career bullets to move to the front and which to cut from my resume. Based on _config.yml.
_config.yml에 있는 마인즈 경력 설명에 오타가 있어. 'schedular'를 'scheduler'로 고쳐줘.
이력서 레이아웃에서 문제해결 섹션 페이지 나눔이 이상해. _sass/modern-resume-theme.scss에서 page-break 관련 스타일 수정해줘.
기술 스택 섹션에 Docker랑 Kubernetes 추가하고 싶어. _config.yml 업데이트해줘.
